keySpecs.label: Plays Blu-ray discs / DVDs with upscaling

description.main: This Sony Blu-ray player lets you enjoy your favourite movies in crystal clear Full HD quality. Every scene is brighter, sharper and packed full of detail. Even standard definition content gets upscaled to near HD quality. The Triluminos colour palette brings vibrant, true-to-life tones and textures to your screen. And Dolby TrueHD and DTS-HD give you high-fidelity surround sound.
goodToKnow: The compact design fits neatly into any space
Share your favourite songs, photos and media using the USB port
It supports a wide range of file formats for media playback
